Eureka Files Surface

Static seed surface. No JavaScript, no live search, no live source probes, no downloads.

Overview Status Sources Evals Demo Queries Limitations Roadmap

This is a static file-tree seed surface. It contains manifests, checksums, and links to public data summaries.

No executable downloads, public mirrors, production signed snapshots, live backend calls, or live source probes are provided in v0.

Production signed snapshots are not available.

The reserved /api/v1 route family is contract-only and not live on this static surface.

Live Probe Gateway Contract v0 is policy-only. There are no live probes, no downloads, and no arbitrary URL fetching here.

Signed Snapshot Format v0 defines a repo seed example at snapshots/examples/static_snapshot_v0/. It is not a public /snapshots/ route, production signed release, or executable download surface.

Relay Surface Design v0 records future local/LAN relay policy only. It does not add a relay server, protocol bridge, network listener, private data exposure, live probe passthrough, or write/admin route.

  • index.txt
  • manifest.json
  • SHA256SUMS
  • README.txt
  • data/README.txt
  • ../data/site_manifest.json
  • ../data/source_summary.json
  • Static resolver demos
  • Demo snapshot data
  • Lite surface
  • Text surface

Eureka is a Python reference backend prototype, not production. This surface uses no scraping, performs no live source probes, and makes no external search calls. external baselines pending/manual; source placeholders remain placeholders.
